description: AI21 builds enterprise AI systems and foundation models, including the Jamba model family and the Maestro agentic workflow product. Its platform also includes file library and tool-integration features in AI21 Studio.
summary: AI21 exposes one authenticated HTTP API at `https://api.ai21.com/studio/v1` covering Jamba chat, Maestro runs, and File Library operations; docs also describe Python and TypeScript SDKs, but no separate public GraphQL API, MCP server, or CLI were found.
